name: Zhuge
description: This devastating automatic crossbow is the perfect marriage of ancient Earth weaponry and Tenno technology.

components.name: Argon Crystal
components.description:
A Void based radioactive resource that decays every day it is out of the Void.

Location: Missions in the Void

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: This devastating automatic crossbow is the perfect marriage of ancient Earth weaponry and Tenno technology.

components.name: Cryotic
components.description:
Usually found in extreme sub-zero environments, Cryotic instantly freezes anything it contacts.

Location: Excavation Missions on Venus, Earth, Phobos, Europa, and Neptune

components.name: Nitain Extract
components.description:
Each vial is produced by the painstaking expression of billions of rare, ocean-vent dwelling microorganisms.

Location: Nightwave Cred Offerings

components.name: Polymer Bundle
components.description:
A hard, thermoplastic casing. Manufactured by Corpus.

Location: Mercury, Venus, and Uranus

patchlogs.name: Update 32.2.0: Lua’s Prey
patchlogs.fixes: Also fixed the same issue occuring on the Zhuge and Zhuge Prime.

patchlogs.name: Gara Prime: Update 30.3.0
patchlogs.fixes:
Wukong Prime, Zhuge Prime, and Ninkondi Prime have entered the Vault!
Replaced Steel Meridian Sacrifice of Zhuge Prime String with Pangolin Prime Handle.

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: Nezha Prime: 29.3.0 + 29.3.0.1
patchlogs.changes: Replaced Steel Meridian’s Sacrifice of Redeemer Prime Blade with Zhuge Prime String.

patchlogs.name: The Old Blood: Prime Vault 26.0.8 + 26.0.8.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Zhuge Prime not showing its Radial Attack in Arsenal stats.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon Remaster: Update 24.6.0
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed the Baza, Zhuge, and Zlok Riven Dispositions not reflecting the changes stated in Hotfix 24.5.8.1. For clarity, they have changed to:
Zhuge: 1.18->1.25

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Hotfix 22.12.3
patchlogs.changes: Changed the Zhuge’s Critical Chance to the intended 20%.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Update 22: Plains of Eidolon
patchlogs.changes: Plan B can no longer be used with the Lenz or Zhuge.

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Hotfix 19.11.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed equipping Zhuge showing incorrect weapon mesh and appearing blurry.

patchlogs.name: Update: Specters of the Rail
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Zhuge’s arrows firing at an odd angle.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.9.0
patchlogs.fixes: •    Fixed arrow skins not visually applying to the Zhuge.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.6.2
patchlogs.fixes:
The Soaring Strike Conclave Mod can no longer be used with the Zhuge.
Zhuge damage has been decreased in Conclave.
Fixed incorrect positioning of the Zhuge's custom tassel.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.6.1 + 18.6.1.1
patchlogs.fixes: ·         Fixed the Zhuge being listed as Alarming when it should be Silent.
